description: Rule-only diagnosis for a carry-state bug.

evidence.wrong_line: Dropped the carry before processing the final warehouse.
evidence.correct_approach: Preserve carry state through the final transition.
evidence.failed_test: Final warehouse requires carrying state into the last step.

description: Deep analysis confirmed the same carry-state bug.

evidence.wrong_line: Reset the carry accumulator before the last transfer.
evidence.correct_approach: Keep the carry accumulator alive until all warehouses are processed.
evidence.failed_test: Two-stage transfer loses the last package count.
